title: Minka

{{Quote|We can't hold out any longer without aid…if we don't get it, none of the Rebels in the Cantros systems…will live long enough to see the Emperor's defeat.|Minka to Leia Organa|<ref name="Meow" />}}
'''Minka''' was a [[Cantrosian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in a [[Minka's faction|Cantrosian faction]] loyal to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], she became embroiled in a conspiracy in her [[Cantros system/Legends|home system]] and fought alongside the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|heroes of the Rebellion]] against a suspected [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Niru's faction|cell]]. She learned that one of her [[Durne|closest allies]] was manipulating the situation and that their supposed enemies were in fact loyal to the Rebellion. After the traitor was arrested, Minka and her companion [[Sami (Cantrosian)|Sami]] sought to repair relations among their people and find a common ground between them.

==Biography==
===Early life and a brush with death===
{{Quote|The three of you seem to know so much about how the final battles with the Empire went…|Minka, to the heroes of the Rebellion|<ref name="Meow" />}}
[[File:Minkakaboom.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Minka screaming as her X-wing sustained critical damage]]
A [[Cantrosian]]<ref name="CN2" /> [[Gender/Legends|female]], Minka was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the<ref name="Meow" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''—Based on corresponding data for [[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Cantros 7]]. At some point in her adult life, she joined a [[Minka's faction|faction]] of her people who were loyal to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and met fellow Cantrosians [[Sami (Cantrosian)|Sami]] and local intelligence network co-ordinator [[Durne]].<ref name="Meow" />

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="TNEC">"[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]" describes the events in the [[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]] as occurring several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in the first half of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> while on a mission to reach the nearest Rebellion outpost, Minka's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] came under fire from [[BTL-A4 Y-wing assault starfighter/bomber|Y-wings]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by Cantrosians from an [[Niru's faction|opposing faction]] that she believed to be loyal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] based on reports from Durne's [[Spy/Legends|spies]]. Her [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmates]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]], and her own [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was damaged. She crashed on the planet [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] shortly after contacting the local control tower; her distress call was heard by [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Rebellion heroes]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who flew to her aid and neutralized the Y-wings. Taken to a [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenter]], Minka was shocked to learn that, despite Durne's reports, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was dead, and that the Empire had been considered [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeated]] for some [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Meow" />

===Minka, Rebel hero===
{{Quote|Go on, Durne. Tell me how glad you are to see me now!|Minka calls out Durne|<ref name="Meow" />}}
[[File:Minkainbed.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Minka at a medcenter on Saijo]]
Minka took the Rebels to an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]] where her Rebellion-loyal faction was [[Cantrosian asteroid base|based]], and introduced them to her comrades, including Sami and Durne. Bemused at [[Solo family/Legends|Solo's]] assertion that there had been no Imperial activity in the [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]] for some time, Minka and Sami traveled with the heroes of the Rebellion aboard Solo's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|ship]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], to the [[Niru's base|base planet]] of the alleged Imperial cell. More Cantrosian Y-wings appeared and damaged the ''Falcon'', forcing the [[Light freighter/Legends|ship]] to land in a gully. Skywalker used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|levitate]] Organa and Minka out of the gully, but he, Sami, and Solo were all captured by the rival faction led by the Cantrosian [[Niru]].<ref name="Meow" />

Despite Minka's desire to help them, she and Organa stayed low, waiting as they observed the situation to make sure they chose the right time to take action. Discovering that Durne<ref name="Meow" />—who had been hired by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Knife]] to sow discord in the Cantros [[Star system/Legends|system]]<ref name="NnT">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref>—had been manipulating tensions between the factions, all of whom in fact supported the Rebellion, Minka and Organa leapt into action to apprehend him. The members of the faction, suspecting the intruders to be Imperials, [[Skirmish in the Cantros system|opened fire]]. Minka returned fire while keeping her [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] set to stun; however, the members of the faction were calmed by Niru. Durne attempted to shoot her, but was incapacitated by Skywalker. With Durne now in custody and his treachery exposed, Minka and Sami introduced themselves to their fellow Rebels and sought to establish a common ground.<ref name="Meow" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Oh, Leia, we've got to go back down and help them.|Minka to Leia Organa|<ref name="Meow" />}}
[[File:Minkamain.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Minka firing her blaster]]
Minka was loyal to the Rebel Alliance, to the point of considering her wingmates' sacrifices worthwhile if it would lead to intervention from the heroes of the Rebellion, and the end of Imperial activity in Cantrosian systems. She cared deeply for Sami, who referred to her as "Darling." When Sami, Solo, and Skywalker were captured by Niru's faction, Minka felt distressed and wanted to assist them. Minka had light [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and orange-colored [[Hair/Legends|fur]], and hair of the same hue run through with lighter streaks.<ref name="Meow" />

==Skills and abilities==
Minka was an expert pilot, being able to survive a heavy-fire environment while her wingmates were killed. She was also proficient in using a blaster.<ref name="Meow" />

==Equipment==
Minka wore a dark blue [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]] with black [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and carried a black [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. She also piloted an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]].<ref name="Meow" />

==Behind the scenes==
Minka appeared in the [[Marvel Comics]] issue [[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' 93]],<ref name="Meow" /> which was released on [[December 18]], [[1984]]<ref name="Marvel">{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 23|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[February]] [[1985]]}}</ref> and written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]]. In the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]], Minka was drawn by [[Sal Buscema]].<ref name="Meow" /> Minka's entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' erroneously states that she was one of the few pilots to survive the Empire's attack on Cantros,<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|2|317|Minka}}</ref> despite the fact that ''Star Wars'' 93 establishes there was no Imperial activity in the Cantros system.<ref name="Meow" /> The entry also<ref name="TCSWE" /> erroneously<ref name="Meow" /> states that Minka was a member of the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="TCSWE" />
